title: pouteria viridis
intro: Pouteria viridis, also known as the Green Pouteria, is a species of tree in the family Sapotaceae, native to Central and South America. The bark and leaves of the Pouteria viridis have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pouteria viridis are believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. Pouteria viridis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the bark typically being dried and then steeped in hot water to create a herbal tea.
